messages.text: Some of my aiohttp requests are failing with ClientConnectionError

messages.header: curl -s localhost:5110/api/events | jq '[.[] | select(.summary | contains("ClientConnectionError") or (.details.response.status_code == null))]'

messages.text: Found 4 failed requests in Smello. All hit the same host with `Connection: close` but your `TCPConnector` has `limit=100`. The connector is exhausting the OS socket limit. Set `limit=20` and add `keepalive_timeout=30`.
